notes: Pełny rebuild wizualny w stylu Cyberdeck Holo. Każdy ekran teraz ma corner brackets w narożnikach paneli, RGB chromatic-aberration na nagłówkach (PLAY, PRACTICE, BOSS RUSH, STATS, QUESTS, SETTINGS, SHOP, SKILL TREE, PROFILE, RECENT MATCHES, VICTORY/DEFEAT), hologram ringi i magenta/gold brand bary na bokach paneli, internal scanline drift, cyber-chip backings na HUD score/music labelach + LV pill. Bottom nav buttony z corner-bracketami. Epilepsy warning pełny Cyberdeck panel chrome + RGB-split heading. Settings page panel wrap z hologram ring.
